# CWE-1125 vulnerable: oversized public attack surface
lang: go
file: CWE-1125-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1125: Excessive Attack Surface — debug and admin routes exposed without auth.
// Vulnerable: router registers heap dump, SQL console, and config dump endpoints.

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/http/pprof"
	"runtime"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

func MountWideSurface(db *gorm.DB) *gin.Engine {
	r := gin.Default()
	r.GET("/health", func(c *gin.Context) { c.String(http.StatusOK, "ok") })
	r.GET("/debug/pprof/*any", gin.WrapH(http.HandlerFunc(pprof.Index)))
	r.GET("/admin/sql", func(c *gin.Context) {
		sql := c.Query("q")
		var rows []map[string]interface{}
		db.Raw(sql).Scan(&rows)
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, rows)
	})
	r.GET("/admin/config", func(c *gin.Context) {
		var m runtime.MemStats
		runtime.ReadMemStats(&m)
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"heap": m.HeapAlloc, "db": db.Name()})
	})
	r.POST("/internal/reload", func(c *gin.Context) { c.Status(http.StatusNoContent) })
	return r
}
